meta.name: Next.js 15 + DaisyUI + Express
meta.description: Full-stack TypeScript monorepo. Next.js App Router with Server & Client Components, DaisyUI/Tailwind styling, Zustand state, and Express REST API. Single npm run dev starts everything.

architecture.summary: Monorepo with Next.js 15 App Router frontend and Express backend. DaisyUI provides pre-built Tailwind components with built-in theme switching. A single 'npm run dev' from root uses concurrently to start both Next.js (port 3000) and Express (port 3001). Server Components handle SSR/SEO, Client Components handle interactivity via Zustand stores that fetch from Express API.

layers.name: Server Components (RSC)
layers.description: Next.js async components that run on the server. Direct data fetching, no client JS shipped. Default for app/ pages and layouts.

layers.name: Client Components (CMP)
layers.description: React 'use client' components for interactivity, event handlers, hooks, and browser APIs. Use DaisyUI component classes.

layers.name: Zustand Stores (STO)
layers.description: Client-side state management. Stores fetch from Express API and provide reactive state to Client Components.

layers.name: Express Backend (API)
layers.description: Separate Node.js/Express server on port 3001. REST API endpoints with Zod validation, business logic, DB queries.

layers.name: MongoDB + Mongoose (MDL)
layers.description: Document database with Mongoose schemas, TypeScript interfaces, indexes, and methods.

architecture.dataFlow: RSC (direct fetch) | CMP -> STO -> fetch(/api) -> Express:3001 -> MongoDB
keyPrinciples: Server Components by default, 'use client' only when needed
DaisyUI component classes for rapid UI (btn, card, modal, etc.)
DaisyUI theme switching via data-theme attribute
Single npm run dev starts both servers
Zustand for client state, Express for business logic
Monorepo with root package.json orchestrating client/ and server/

CMP.description: React Client Component with DaisyUI + TypeScript. Uses 'use client' directive for interactivity.

CONTENT.description: Component JSX content using DaisyUI classes

RSC.description: React Server Component (default in App Router). No 'use client' — runs on server, zero client JS.

STO.description: Zustand store with TypeScript. Client-side state that fetches from Express API.

API.description: Express TypeScript route handler with Zod validation

METHOD.description: HTTP method (get, post, put, delete, patch)

MDL.description: Mongoose TypeScript model with schema and indexes

FNC.description: Utility function (shared between client and server)

V.description: Next.js App Router page (Server Component by default). For pages needing interactivity, import Client Components.

tailwind.content:
import type { Config } from 'tailwindcss';
import daisyui from 'daisyui';

const config: Config = {
  content: [
    './src/pages/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}',
    './src/components/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}',
    './src/app/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}',
  ],
  theme: {
    extend: {},
  },
  plugins: [daisyui],
  daisyui: {
    themes: [
      'light',
      'dark',
      'cupcake',
      'emerald',
      'corporate',
      'synthwave',
      'retro',
      'cyberpunk',
      'valentine',
      'halloween',
      'garden',
      'forest',
      'aqua',
      'lofi',
      'pastel',
      'fantasy',
      'wireframe',
      'black',
      'luxury',
      'dracula',
      'cmyk',
      'autumn',
      'business',
      'acid',
      'lemonade',
      'night',
      'coffee',
      'winter',
      'dim',
      'nord',
      'sunset'
    ],
    darkTheme: 'dark',
    base: true,
    styled: true,
    utils: true,
    logs: false,
  },
};

export default config;

tsconfigClient.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "allowJs": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

tsconfigServer.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "lib": ["ES2020"],
    "module": "commonjs",
    "moduleResolution": "node",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": "./src",
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
}

envExample.content:
# Client
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3001

# Server
PORT=3001
CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:3000
MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/myapp
NODE_ENV=development

ThemeSelector.description: DaisyUI theme switcher dropdown. Uses data-theme attribute on <html> for instant theme switching across all 30 built-in DaisyUI themes.

Navbar.description: DaisyUI responsive navbar with theme selector, mobile drawer, and navigation links
